zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Peart於1586年9月5日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾受洗時，他的父親Stephen Peart31歲，母親Margaret27歲。他於1614年7月10日與Susanna George在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1665年3月17日在他的家鄉享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Perth (Perths), which is recorded as Pertc. 1128. The placename derives from Pictish perta ‘(at the) thicket, copse’.
English: nickname, probably from a shortened form of Middle English, Old French apert ‘open, plain to see’, of persons ‘frank, honest’ or ‘accomplished’.

variants.name: Pert
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Peart  .

variants.name: Peard
meanings: English (Devon): perhaps a variant of Peart with voicing of final -d.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Peart was christened on 5 September 1586, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen Peart, was 31 and his mother, Margaret, was 27. He married Susanna George on 10 July 1614, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 March 1665, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Peart a été baptisé le 5 septembre 1586, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Peart, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Susanna George le 10 juillet 1614, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1665, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Peart am 5. September 1586 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Peart 31 und seine Mutter Margaret 27. Er hat am 10. Juli 1614 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Susanna George geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. März 1665 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Susanna George il 10 luglio 1614, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 marzo 1665, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Peart(이)가 1586년 9월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Peart(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1614년 7월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Susanna George(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1665년 3월 17일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Peart был крещен 5 сентября 1586 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen Peart было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna George 10 июля 1614 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 марта 1665 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.
